reviews.comment:
Un gran agradecimiento al personal de Full de la Estación de YPF situada en Km 796.5 de Ruta 7, en Villa Mercedes (San Luis). Ello debido aque a través de Adriana I. Torres, recuperaron, guardaron y devolvieron un bolso que había olvidado en el Full. Mi reconocimiento y felicitaciones por su actitud.

(Translated by Google)
A big thank you to the Full staff at the YPF station located at Km 796.5 of Route 7, in Villa Mercedes (San Luis). Thanks to Adriana I. Torres, they recovered, stored, and returned a bag I had forgotten at the Full. My appreciation and congratulations for their dedication.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtOGRlUWZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Todo bien menos que no andaba la aplicación de Ypf
Los baños bien
La limpieza bien
Poca iluminación
Los empleados bien buena onda
La nafta estaba a un alto precio
La entrada a la estación no está muy bien marcada y es de calle de piedras no está asfaltada tendrían que asfaltarla ya que las piedras pueden romper una rueda o abollar la chapa de otro vehículos que entren o salgan al mismo tiempo

(Translated by Google)
Everything was fine except the YPF app didn't work.
The bathrooms were fine.
Cleanliness was fine.
Poor lighting.
The employees were very friendly.
The gas was expensive.
The entrance to the station isn't well marked and is a cobblestone road. It's not paved. They should repave it, as the stones can break a wheel or dent the bodywork of other vehicles entering or leaving at the same time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtMG9EQzF3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar para parar, recargar y seguir viaje. Destacable la limpieza de los baños y espacios públicos así como el area exterior

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop, recharge, and continue your journey. The cleanliness of the restrooms and public areas, as well as the outdoor area, is particularly noteworthy.
